feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Org Replication From EC to S4 have different structures
entry.content:
Dear Members ,

I have a scenario where the Org replication structure in EC is different from S4/ HANA . We are replicating data from EC to S4/HANA . We have  multiple managers assigned to multiple users in EC . we also have mass positions which needs to be mapped in S4/HANA . All these mass positions have been kept in one position in EC in a  dummy position at a level higher . We also have different relationship matrix for these managers . Example employee 1 reports to dummy1 but has relationship mentor1 , Mentor 2 etc. These Mentor 1 , Mentor 2 positions are holder of different managers .

 

I have worked with basic set up of BIB or Org replication your guidance would be highly appreciated . How do we manage situations like this when the structure of EC is different than the structure of S4/hana and how do we create the right relationships in S4/HANA .  Can this be handled in mapping ? BADI ? or some where in staging area ?

entry.title: Ajuste mensual de ISR Mexico
entry.content:
Saludos,

Tengo el caso siguiente donde se ejecuta en la ultima nomina del mes (quincenal o semanal) con ajuste de ISR a fin de mes.  En este proceso la base gravada del mes no esta incluyendo el monto gravado de nominas especiales ejecutadas.

Hay alguna configuracion que permita sumar este gravado extraordinario o se debe hacer uso de algun exit.

Gracias

Liseth Linarez

entry.title: SAP HCM for SAP Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have spent many days exploring documentation on RISE with SAP and the conversion guides for transitioning for SAP ERP to SAP Hana Cloud Private Edition. Globally I do have an overview of how this is working and what are the steps to be taken for the conversion process. 

The scenario I do not understand regarding the conversion process is when SAP ERP system is used for different modules like FI, CO, SD, MM and also HCM within the same client and the business need is to only migrate HCM to SAP Cloud Private Edition  and keep the rest of the modules (FI, SD, MM ) as they are on the SAP ERP system. Is it possible to only migrate HCM to SAP Cloud Private Edition or the whole SAP ERP system should be converted including all modules?  during the conversion process is there any step where only specific modules and application can be selected for the conversion?

Many thanks

Rachid.

entry.title: A Deep Dive into Role-Based Permissions: Best Practices for Access Management
entry.content:
What are Role-based Permissions?

Role-based permissions are a security model in SAP SuccessFactors that allows you to grant or restrict the system access to any user.

It helps organizations ensure that the right people are getting the right permissions in the system.

Role based permissions has three main elements called:-

  • Permission Groups
  • Permission Roles
  • Target Population
  1. Permission Groups – Group of Employees

Permission groups are the user or user’s who share similar permissions or certain attributes.

  1. Permission Roles – Set of permissions

Permission roles are set of permissions a user can access or do in the system.

  1. Target Population – Target population are employees for whom behalf the action has been performed. It is denoted by t.

Note:- All permissions doesn’t required the target population, only some permissions requires that and it’s denoted by t at the end of the permission.

 

You can identify the permission groups, roles and target population by finding out who, What and whom in your requirements. Where Who represents the permission groups, what represents the permission roles and whom respresents the target population.

 

To simplify the steps, you can divide it into below steps:-

  1. Permission Groups
  2. Permission Roles
  3. Granted Population
  4. Targeted Population
  5. Assign permissions to the Granted Population
  6. Define who are the targeted Population

Process to implement the RBP is as below:-

Permission Groups -> Permission Roles -> Granting Permission Roles to Permission Groups - > Target Population

Let’s try to understand the role-based permissions with example. Suppose a customer wants that only HR managers can create/update or delete the objectives/goals for employees in US.

 

Here HR manager in USA will be our Granted population.

Create/Update or delete the goals and other permissions are permission roles.

All employees who work in USA are the targeted population.

 

Procedure to Implement RBP

Pre-requisites-

You must have access to role based permission.

 

  1. Permission Groups

To create Permission Groups, User must have relevant Permission.

In Demo Environment, I logged in as Aanya Singh(sfadmin){Superadmin for the system}

Procedure:-

In Homepage, under search for actions or people search for Manage Permission Groups -> Create New - > Give a unique name -> Select the employees you want to Grouped -> Done.

 

Give a Name to your Group Name-> Select the employee whom you want to give permission.

In below example:-  We have grouped Human resource employees who are working in US and excluded the employees who job level is Executive Support.

Group Name :: Granted_User_Sugandha

User Type :: Employee

 

 

Result:-

Now we have successfully created the group Granted_user_Sugandha under permission groups, you can see we have 23 Active memberships.

 

 

  1. Permission Roles

To create Permission Groups, User must have relevant Permission.

In Demo Environment, I logged in as Aanya Singh(sfadmin){Superadmin for the system}

Procedure:-

Go to Manage Permission Roles -> Create - > Basic information -> Add Permission -> Done.

 

Img 2.1                                                                              Img 2.1

 

The next step is to fill in Basic information in Create Role such as Name and description(optional). In the example below, we have named Human Resource_US (Sugandha_Test) -> Click Next.

                                                                           Img2.2

Add Permissions, Give the required permission you want to give to the user. We have  User Permission and Administrative Permission.

After adding the required permission, save it.

 

  1. Granting Permission Roles to Groups

Go to Permission roles -> Under Human Resource_US_Test -> Add Role Assignment -> Basic Information - > 

 

 Whom you want to give access, to all employees or from Groups, If Group than Which group you want to give access, select the group & if you want to add their direct managers you can do and Save.

 

  1. Target Population

Note- We have given additional permission in the roles for human resource_US as shown in below image, Under User permissions, Object plan permission need a Target Population (Denoted by t symbol), Where we need to add Target population. In below example Human resource_US can create a goal for employees in US., our target population is employees in USA.

entry.title: 401k/Roth combined employer match issue
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We have an issue when we match a  combined contribution of a 401(k) and a Roth plan

401(k) and Roth = 100% match on the first 3% and then 50% match on the next 3% which equates to a MAX of 4.50% employer match.

Scenario:

Employee elects the two at:

3% 401(k) = 3% Employer Match

3% Roth = 3% Employer Match

SAP calculates a total of 6% employer match which exceeds the 4.50% employer match.

Has anyone else experienced this and if so, what have you done to resolve this?

entry.title: How to have Dynamic validity dates of Quota through TE
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can you please help me with below requirement. 

I could be able to generate first entry, but the second entry is adding the same Quota, new quota is not generating with different validity dates.

If Employee report 1003 - 8.50 hours of time on 07-10-2024 for 01-10-2024, Full day Compensatory Off (90) quota should be generated with the validity from 02.10.2024 to 01.11.2024.

If Employee report 1004 - 4.25 hours of time on 07-10-2024 for 07-10-2024, Half day Compensatory Off (90) quota should be generated with the validity from 08.10.2024 to 07.11.2024.

Thanks, Goutham.

entry.title: ORACLE ID in search help option in PA20/PA30 customization/configuration
entry.content:
Do you have any ideas on how to proceed on this? Thank you. 
 
In SAP we usually search for an employee in PA20 and PA30 by entering the SAP ID number. There are different ways available to search: for example, tax number or name. As for my client the Oracle ID is used frequently, we would like to have the option to be able to use this ID to search for the employee in SAP added to the selection options.
The Oracle ID is stored in IT105 - subtype 99Y1 = Person ID

entry.title: Payroll data extraction before release to accounting
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Please help in extracting monthly SAP HR payroll data from HCM before it is actually release to accounts.

appreciate your help.

regards

zaks

entry.title: W2 Box 14 reporting wrong amount for field TALO EX OT WAGES
entry.content:
When we run W2’s we found that W2 Box 14 is reporting the wrong amount for field TALO EX OT WAGES for non-Alabama employees that has overtime wages but doesn’t have wage type /PPE.

However, this is working as expected for AL employees that has OT and wage type /PPE in the results table.

entry.title: synchronization between employee and business partner, when CP is related to 2 different pernr
entry.content: S/4Hana, synchronization between employees and business partners, when employee has 2 different personnel numbers one inactive and one active, a new business partner was not created. When running program /SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE with the new pernr the message is: pernr was successfully synchronized , however no new business partner has been created, and no change has occurred to the previous business partner.

entry.title: LSMW issue with assigning info type to an object type in CR02_SOLVED, pls ignore
entry.content:
Hi SAP Guru,

For PP work center Qualification control,  there is an integration between PP work center and HR work center (Object type A) to which qualifications are assigned. (See ill. 1: CR02-HRMS-Qualification)

In LSMW batch input recording,  always encounter the issue that the ticking of the check box is not recorded which results in the failure when executing the LSMW. 

Shown below, after specifying the Object type, need to tick the check box. But the action can not be captured in recording.

Please kindly advise if you have any experience on this.

Sally

entry.title: Eseparation - Withdrawal request
entry.content:
We have configured E-separation solution. Initiation is working fine but if initiator/ employee withdraws the request, we are getting error and not able to perform the withdrawal request.

"You are not authorized to perform this action for this request"

Authorizations are fine.

entry.title: hi,we are also facing same issue .there is any solution for these?
BIB Integration issue from SAP to Success Factors
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are currently transferring Global Info data from SAP to Success Factors, via the SF Personal Info section. The entity ID used for this process in SAP is: "ERP_WS_18_GBR - Global Info UK Template for Web Service."

We are running the standard SAP program "ECPAO_EMPL_DMT_JOB_SCHEDULER" for this purpose. However, we have observed errors in SLG1 below  scenario during the transfer process.

Scenario:Edit/change Infotype 0002(Personal Info)  align with SF Personal Info date and no change in master data. (IT9600) Global info diversity.

Result: The data will flow successfully to SuccessFactors (SF). However  diversity information in SuccessFactors will be deleted.

Any suggestion for above issue

entry.title: How to configure & view the ESOP amount to display in Form 16 & in which section ? Need urgent help
entry.content: Hi. I have a wagetype configured for maintaining ESOP amount in Infotype 15 . It is reflecting in Annual Perk but not in Form 16 of the employee ? How to do this ?

entry.title: How to integrate HCM with other non SAP Apps?
entry.content:
Hey All, 
how we integrate SAP HCM to other Apps( non SAP). I have a product ( Testfuse) that conduct the candidate assessment. I want to integrate this into SAP HCM to help the requirement process. 

The scenario of integration will be as :

  • When candidate gets shortlisted the details of candidates ( email) should be sent to testfuse to invite a candidate for an assessment. 
  • The candidate will be then invited by testfuse and they perform the assessment in testfuse.
  • After the assessment the job fitness score will be calculated in testfuse and recruiter observe the results of candidate.
  • When  recruiter  change the status of the candidate in testfuse the status should also be changed in HCM. 


So what will be the guidelines to implement this integrations and also we have oauth to verify the integrated apps in testfuse. 

Anyone help to implement this integration. 

HCM (Human Capital Management) SAP Cloud Integration for data services

entry.title: Canvas report Vacant Position, need to filter only current incumbent data
entry.content:
I have built a canvas report to view vacant positions. I have used the calculated column if Incumbent User Id is blank and Incumbent Employee Status is Separated then it should be a vacant position. 

The issue I am facing is all incumbents tagged previously to the position are shown in the report, and not the current status of the Incumbent alone. Is there a way to filter only the current incumbent status.

entry.title: "Revolutionizing SAP Recruitment with HireRig.AI"
entry.content:
The new white paper on HireRig.AI presents an innovative approach to SAP recruitment, addressing key challenges faced by businesses in adapting to rapid technological changes. By leveraging AI-driven, project-based hiring, HireRig.AI is set to transform traditional recruitment methods, eliminating biases, accelerating the hiring process, and ensuring a more accurate match between candidates’ skills and SAP project requirements.

Key insights from the white paper include:

  • How project-based hiring through HireRig.AI enhances recruitment efficiency and effectiveness.
  • Real-world case studies demonstrating the platform’s impact on reducing time-to-hire and mitigating project delays.
  • The cost-saving potential of flexible, scalable hiring models for SAP businesses. 

Link - https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7272695170360328192?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop

For an in-depth exploration of how HireRig.AI can revolutionize your SAP talent acquisition strategy, I invite you to read the full white paper. Let’s collaborate to shape the future of SAP recruitment and drive innovation in the technical hiring ecosystem. Transform the Future of SAP Recruitment with HireRig.AI

entry.title: How to filter for Infotype 7 Field status time management in H99_HRFORMS_CALL?
entry.content:
Hi, when using PT61 for creating time statements, employees that do not participate in time management (infotype 0007 field Status time management / zterf subtype 0) are automatically excluded. The problem is PT61 can not create HRFORMS documents but only ABAP Lists. 

We therefore use H99_HRFORMS_CALL for creating time statements based on HRFORMS. The problem here is this program does not automatically exclude employees that do not participate in time management and therefore creates empty pages for those and there is no standard selection option to exclude these employees. Is it possible to create this selection option without programming or is there an easy programming solution?

A workaround would be copying those employee numbers in SE16n and excluding them in H99_HRFORMS_CALL each time we create time statements but this is not ideal.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: After creating a new work schedule, while running time evaluation it is showing error.
entry.content:
Hi,

 Created a new work schedule and after assigning it to IT0007 and running time evaluation, it is showing this error 

Can someone explain on what can be done
